samples.summary: Codex 团队 David Wiesen 的技术博客详细介绍了在 Windows 上为 Codex 构建沙箱的曲折过程：从免提权沙箱的原型（使用合成 SID 和 write-restricted token 限制文件写入，环境变量劝退网络）到必须接受提权的最终方案（创建两个本地沙箱用户，通过 Windows 防火墙实现网络隔离）。
samples.title: OpenAI 给 Codex 在 Windows 造了一个沙箱

cluster_samples.cluster_title: Replit used for AI-assisted investor outreach
core_facts: Replit helped an entrepreneur build a pitchdeck, find 1897 investors, and automate email outreach, resulting in meetings with 2 investors.

cluster_samples.cluster_title: Gemini API adds webhook support
core_facts: Webhooks have been shipped in the Gemini API. An end-to-end cookbook was created using Cloudflare Workers.

cluster_samples.cluster_title: Anthropic launches enterprise services firm
core_facts: Anthropic has built a $1.5B firm embedding engineers into enterprises to implement Claude. Blackstone and Goldman's portfolio companies are first customers. This competes with Anthropic's existing partners Accenture, Deloitte, PwC.

cluster_samples.cluster_title: Cursor debug mode used to fix Swift bug
core_facts: Used Cursor's debug mode to fix a Swift app bug where initial characters were cut off. Cursor instrumented, reproduced, read debug logs, implemented fix, and verified.

cluster_samples.cluster_title: Ctx2Skill paper analysis by 李继刚
core_facts: 李继刚解读论文 Ctx2Skill: 模型自我博弈提取技能时出现对抗坍缩，提出Cross-Time Replay方法选择最优版本。

cluster_samples.cluster_title: Cursor 团队分享 Agent Harness 改进经验
core_facts: Cursor 团队发表博客《持续改进我们的 Agent Harness》，讨论了 harness 衡量方法、模型定制、中途换模型问题及未来趋势。

cluster_samples.cluster_title: Genspark launches sb-git agent-friendly Git server
core_facts: Genspark announces sb-git, a Git server rewritten for agents, free to use. 1GB free, 10GB for Plus/Pro.

recommendations: Review uncertain relations and tune prompts with real examples.
Add vector indexes for item_cards and cluster_cards before larger runs.
Keep primary relation enum unchanged for now; it covered Phase 1.1 control flow.
Collect more source_signals before trusting source_profile priority suggestions.
Run a larger dry-run before any write-real-db semantic pass.

cluster_card.cluster_title: Adialante launches mobile MRI to reduce costs and wait times
